sections: 4.1.1 Requirement Analysis [→ 方案完整性(15分)]

# 04_GENERATE_PROPOSAL_OUTLINE

## KEYWORDS
`structure` `outline` `chapter` `planning` `投标文件大纲` `章节规划` `内容清单`

---

## TASK
Generate proposal structure → allocate pages → create task list

## INPUT
- Scoring criteria (from 02_PARSE)
- Requirements analysis (from 01_ANALYZE)

## OUTPUT
```json
{
  "toc": [{chapter_id, name, pages, scoring_link}],
  "chapter_detail": [{id, sections, content_checklist, page_target}],
  "task_list": [{task_id, owner, deliverable, deadline}]
}
```

---

## STANDARD_PROPOSAL_STRUCTURE

```
Ch.ID | Title              | Pages | Scoring Link        | Priority

2     | Company Profile  | 3-5   | Qualification      | High
3     | Solution Overview| 3-5   | Tech baseline      | High
4     | Technical        | 20-40 | Technical 60-70%   | CRITICAL ⭐
5     | Implementation   | 8-12  | Feasibility        | High
6     | Quality Assurance| 4-6   | Quality             | Medium
7     | Project Team     | 4-6   | Team capability    | High
8     | Case Studies     | 6-10  | Experience         | High
9     | Risk Management  | 3-5   | Risk miti
